sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: RTX 2025년 4분기 매출 242억 달러·연간 886억 달러, 2026년 성장 가이던스 제시

keyPoints.text: 4분기 매출이 242억 달러로 전년 대비 12%(유기적 14%) 증가하며 한 해를 강하게 마무리했다.
연간 매출은 886억 달러로 10%(유기적 11%) 늘었고, 연간 잉여현금흐름은 79억 달러로 전년 대비 34억 달러 증가했다.
회사는 2026년 가이던스로 조정 매출 최대 930억 달러, 조정 EPS 최대 6.80달러를 제시하며 추가 성장을 전망했다.

businessChanges.text: 회사는 수주잔고 이행과 핵심 프로그램 생산능력 확대, 차세대 제품 투자에 집중하고 있다고 밝혔다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 GAAP EPS는 1.19달러였고, 조정 EPS는 전년 대비 1% 증가했다.
연간 GAAP EPS는 4.96달러, 조정 EPS는 10% 늘었고 연간 영업현금흐름은 106억 달러였다.

watchItems.text: 2026년 조정 매출 최대 930억 달러·조정 EPS 최대 6.80달러 가이던스의 달성 여부를 지켜봐야 한다.
잉여현금흐름 가이던스 상단인 87억 5,000만 달러 도달을 위한 현금창출력을 확인할 필요가 있다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: RTX Reports 2025 Results and Announces 2026 Outlook RTX delivers strong 2025 sales, EPS, and free cash flow;* Expects continued sales, earnings, and cash flow growth in 2026 ARLINGTON, Va., January 27, 2026 – RTX (NYSE: RTX) reports fourth quarter and full year 2025 results, and announces 2026 outlook. Fourth quarter 2025 • Sales of $24.2 billion, up 12 percent versus prior year, and up 14 percent organically* • GAAP EPS of $1.19, including $0.31 of acquisition accounting adjustments, $0.02 of restructuring, and $0.03 of other net significant and/or no n-recurring items • Adjusted EPS* of $1.55 , up 1 percent versus prior year • Operating cash flow of $4.2 billion ; free   Normalized numeric aliases: $24.2 billion = 242억 달러; $4.2 billion = 42억 달러; $3.2 billion = 32억 달러; $268 billion = 2,680억 달러; $161 billion = 1,610억 달러; $107 billion = 1,070억 달러; $24.2 = 24.2달러; $1.19 = 1.19달러; $0.02 = 0.02달러; $268 = 268달러; 1 percent = 1%; $161 = 161달러; $107 = 107달러; 12 percent = 12%; 14 percent = 14%.

Sales of $88.6 billion, up 10 percent versus prior year, and up 11 percent organically* • GAAP EPS of $4.96 , including $1.15 of acquisition accounting adjustments, $0.14 of restructuring, and $0.04 of other net significant and/or no n-recurring items • Adjusted EPS* of $6.29 , up 10 percent versus prior year • Operating cash flow of $10.6 billion; free cash flow* of $7.9 billion, up $3.4 billion versus prior year Outlook for full year 2026 • Adjusted sales* of $92.0 to $93.0 billion • Organic sales growth* of 5 to 6 percent • Adjusted EPS* of $6.60 - $6.80 • Free cash flow* of $8.25 - $8.75 billion “ RTX delivered strong sales, adjusted EPS* and fr  Normalized numeric aliases: $88.6 billion = 886억 달러; $10.6 billion = 106억 달러; $7.9 billion = 79억 달러; $3.4 billion = 34억 달러; $93.0 billion = 930억 달러; $8.75 billion = 87억 5,000만 달러; $88.6 = 88.6달러; $4.96 = 4.96달러; $0.14 = 0.14달러; $3.4 = 3.4달러; $8.25 = 8.25달러; $6.80 = 6.80달러; $8.75 = 8.75달러; 10 percent = 10%; 11 percent = 11%; 6 percent = 6%.

n focused on investing in new capabilities, expanding production capacity, and executing on our backlog to meet the growing needs of our customers.” 1 *Adjusted net sales (also referred to as adjusted sales), organic sales, adjusted operating profit (loss) and margin percentage (ROS), segment operating profit (loss) and margin percentage (ROS), adjusted segment sales, adjusted segment operating profit (loss) and margin percentage (ROS), adjusted net income, adjusted earnings per share (“EPS”), adjusted effective tax rate, and free cash flow are non-GAAP financial measures.
